caption: A person is opening a large, shrink-wrapped box of trading cards on a desk covered with a tropical-themed mat featuring palm trees. In the top-left frame, a hand reaches toward the plastic-wrapped container. By the top-right frame, the hand has lifted the top section of the box, revealing yellow cardboard packaging inside. In the bottom-left and bottom-right frames, the box is fully open, showcasing numerous vertical packs of cards lined up inside. A man wearing a dark t-shirt is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the corner, reacting to the opening. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed as on-screen text in the upper right of the scene. Equipment, including a computer monitor and other gear, is visible in the background of the room.
